validation.slug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

subscription.needMoreDesc: Upgrade when you are ready—mock changes apply instantly.

subscription.compareDesc: Pick the plan that matches your rollout stage.

workspace.restrictedDesc: Only the tenant owner can manage members and invites here.
